description:
# History $ref Demo

演示 `$ref` 引用共享 history 的功能。两个虚拟用户，各带预设对话上下文，验证基模在已知上下文下的问答能力。

diabetic_user_history.content: I'm a 45-year-old male diagnosed with type 2 diabetes 3 years ago. I take metformin 500mg twice daily.
Thank you for sharing that. I've noted your diabetes diagnosis and current metformin regimen. How can I help you today?
My latest HbA1c was 7.8%, up from 7.2% three months ago.
I see your HbA1c has increased from 7.2% to 7.8%. That's a notable change. Have there been any changes in your diet, exercise, or medication adherence recently?

athlete_user_history.content: I'm a 28-year-old female marathon runner. I train about 60 miles per week.
Got it — competitive distance runner with high weekly mileage. What would you like to discuss?
I've been experiencing knee pain on the lateral side during long runs, started about 2 weeks ago.

Lateral knee pain in a high-mileage runner could point to several things, with IT band syndrome being common. Has the pain been getting worse, and does it appear at a consistent distance into your runs?
